description: Flowing aurora borealis bands using anisotropic FBM with vertical stretching and gentle domain warp.

anisotropy.notes: Stretch vertically by reducing Y frequency

example_prompts: use anisotropic FBM with vertical stretching for aurora borealis bands
create flowing ethereal sky bands with gentle domain warping
generate aurora-like atmospheric patterns using stretched FBM noise

camera.notes: Render as sky dome or fullscreen quad

screenshot_metadata.notes: Map to green-teal-purple gradient. Animate time slowly for gentle drift.
